# UC-23.7.5 · Agent Occupancy and Schedule Adherence

## Description

Aggregates CCaaS agent-state telemetry into canonical buckets (**available**, **busy**, **after_call_work**, breaks, lunches, coaching, meetings, **system_unavailable**) using **`coalesce()`** keys across vendors, derives interval occupancy **`(busy + ACW)/(busy + ACW + available)`**, compares dwell totals against WFM schedule segments for adherence percentage, and aligns hourly staffing posture with queue-plane Erlang intensity plus ASA/abandon/vendor SL snapshots so realtime adherence dips reveal burnout-level occupancy spikes before ASA or abandon-rate alarms fire.

## Value

Workforce planners defend staffing budgets with Erlang **C** intensity versus staffed heads — occupancy sits near **`traffic_erlangs/N`** when queues stabilize in the mid-seventies to **90%** band: land under **70%** and you confess over-rostered minutes; push agents past **90%** for quarters and Cornell **ILR** service-work research ties extreme load to turnover that erodes coaching time. This view links the same occupancy math to **80/20** voice service-level targets (**80%** answered inside **20** seconds per **ICMI** industry baselines), quantifying the hourly **$4–8** per-seat waste from chronic overstaffing while flagging adherence below **90%** that silently erodes predictable **SLA** attainment (sibling ticket SLAs such as **UC-23.7.1** still differ because they measure case resolution clocks, not telephony staffing).

## Implementation

(1) Land multi-vendor agent-state JSON or warehouse rows into **`index=business`** through **DB Connect** JDBC extracts (nightly skill-hour tables) plus **HEC** micro-batches for sub-hourly state flips; (2) publish **`wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** keyed to **`agent_uid`** with the same identifiers your WFM payroll system uses; (3) normalize reason codes vendor-by-vendor before trusting occupancy numerators; (4) schedule peak-hour saved searches every fifteen minutes with throttling on **`team_uid`** to protect integration accounts; (5) route **ITSI** or email digests when **`occupancy_pct`** exceeds **92%** for two consecutive buckets or **`adherence_pct`** drops more than twelve points beneath the prior week rolling median.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or Splunk Cloud stack with **`srchIndexesAllowed`** granting **`business`** to workforce analytics roles plus separation between PI-ready extracts (`ccaas:*`) and payroll-facing JDBC identities (`dyn365:wfm_segment`).
• Heavy Forwarder or scheduler capable of executing **Splunk DB Connect** (`splunk_app_db_connect`) identities through **`java.security.policy`** controlled JDBC URLs toward Snowflake / Azure Synapse / Oracle warehouses hosting CCaaS vendor snapshots.
• Secrets vault integration for OAuth **`client_credentials`** used by middleware collectors hitting **NICE**, **Genesys Cloud**, **Talkdesk**, **Microsoft Dataverse**, etc.; rotate tokens shorter than vendor TTL defaults.
• Capacity expectation: fifteen-second cadence **`ccaas:agent_state`** micro-batches average **6 KB**/event/agent/minute versus hourly **`business:queue_skill_hourly`** rows near **250 bytes**/skill bucket.
• Governance alignment between workforce optimization (`traffic_erlangs`) and HR disciplinary uses of adherence — publish anonymization rules before broadcasting **`agent_uid`** dashboards broadly.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Pipeline **A — Warehouse-first:** Deploy **Splunk DB Connect** (Splunkbase **2686**) `db_connections.conf` stanza naming JDBC URLs such as Snowflake **`jdbc:snowflake://<account>.snowflakecomputing.com/?warehouse=WFM_WH`** or Synapse **`jdbc:sqlserver://...`**. Schedule incremental pulls (`inputs.conf` **`interval`** **900–3600** seconds) selecting **`historical_session`** columns from Avaya CMS, **`fact_agent_presence`** grain tables emitted by Five9 unload jobs, or **`explore_exports`** curated by Talkdesk DBT models — landing sourcetypes **`five9:agent_state`**, **`talkdesk:explore_row`**, **`avaya:cms_session`** with `_time` mapped from **`segment_start_gmt`**.
Pipeline **B — Near-real-time REST collectors:** Containerized Python forwarders authenticate via OAuth to **`https://api.incontact.com/incontactapi/services/v22.0/agent-states`** (NICE CXone) or **`https://api.mypurecloud.com/api/v2/analytics/users/aggregates/query`** (Genesys Cloud) every **60–120** seconds. Serialize canonical payloads (`agent_uid`, `team_uid`, `sess_uid`, `agent_state`, `duration_sec`) before POST through Splunk **HTTP Event Collector** tokens scoped to **`ccaas:agent_state`**.
Pipeline **C — Hybrid ERP schedules:** Pull **Dynamics 365 Customer Service** Omnichannel **`msdyn_ocsession`** slices via Power Automate nightly CSV drops ingested through **`dyn365:wfm_segment`** sourcetype or via DB Connect pulling **`ScheduledDuration`** derivations aligned with payroll calendars.
Publish **`lookup:wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** with reviewer **`checksum_sha256`** stored beside lookup definitions (`transforms.conf`). Ensure **`segment_start_local`** strings carry explicit **`America/Chicago`** offsets (`%z`) before Splunk parses — ambiguous timestamps wreck adherence denominators.
Optional **Splunk Add-on for Cisco UCCE/UCCX** (**2814**) when UC telemetry arrives through Splunk-supported Cisco bundles — route **`ucce:finesse_presence`** into the same **`agent_uid`** namespace via **`props.conf`** **`FIELDALIAS`** merging **`PeripheralID`**.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Operational SPL intentionally separates denominator philosophies: **`occupancy_pct`** honors **`busy + ACW + available`** productive routing windows while **`occupancy_login_pct`** mirrors **`(busy + ACW)/(busy + ACW + available)`** variants requested by legacy Erlang spreadsheets — twin outputs prevent finance debates.
Primary adherence math reads **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** and **`matched_inside_schedule`** via **`lookup wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** aligned to payroll identifiers; when planners publish only interval flags, pivot to **`sum(eval(if(in_schedule="Y",dur_s,0)))`** collectors against Aspect **`/wfm/services/api/`** payloads instead of CSV rows.
Queue-plane **`join`** pulls **`business:queue_skill_hourly`** metrics (`offered_calls`, **`staffed_agents`**, **`avg_handle_sec`**) so **`traffic_erlangs = λ × AHT / 3600`** aligns with **`occupancy_erlang_pct ≈ traffic_erlangs ÷ staffed_agents`** — deviation bigger than eight points flags denominator mismatch between CCaaS counts and WFM roster totals.
Ship **`lookup erlang_c_sl.csv`** (columns **`staffed_heads`**, **`traffic_erlangs`**, **`thresh_sec`**, **`sl_within_thresh_pct`**) populated offline from authoritative Erlang calculators or IT analytics tooling — the SPL consumes those engineered probabilities alongside **`vendor_sl_pct`** fallback rows pulled straight from vendor queue snapshots.
Configure alerts with **`trigger.threshold`** **`occupancy_pct>92`** AND **`traffic_erlangs/staffed_agents < 0.78`** (meaning latent inbound slack exists yet agents remain overloaded due to shrink mis-tags) routing to **`wf_analytics`** Slack channel with **`suppress`** **`team_uid`** four hours.

Step 3 — Validate
Hourly reconciliation drill: export vendor supervisor cockpit (**Genesys CX Analytics**, **NICE Central**, **Five9 Supervisor**) totals for **`Occupancy`** / **`Schedule Adherence`** on identical **`team_uid`** slices — Splunk deltas above **±4** percentage points trigger **`props`** investigations before trusting Splunk payroll proofs.
Cross-check Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** against automated workforce **`Forecasted Agents`** spreadsheet row using identical **`lambda`** definitions — mismatched **`calls_offered`** filters (including **`abandoned`** vs **`answered`** numerator choices) explain predictable nightly drift.
Validate **`sess_uid`** cardinality (`dc(sess_uid)` versus concurrent **`logged_in`** counts). Persistent **`sessions_seen`** triple workforce roster implies duplicate ingestion tenants (**Disney**, **Apple**, enterprise isolation duplicates).
Perform **`makeresults`** replay tests feeding synthetic **`ccaas:agent_state`** sequences through **`transaction`** harness verifying **`splunk.sankey`** **Available→Busy→After_Call_work** arcs mirror vendor supervisor timelines.
Certify **`hour_bucket`** joins against **`strftime`** UTC boundaries versus supervisor consoles localized — mismatched **`DST`** transitions spotlight ingestion timezone bugs faster than SLA retrospectives.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Dashboard Studio layout (“Workforce posture — occupancy vs Erlang”) stacks heatmap row (**Peak occupancy footprint**) atop paired gauges (**Actual occupancy vs Erlang occupancy**) plus **`splunk.line`** overlays referencing **`vendor_sl_pct`** from **`business:queue_skill_hourly`**.
Embed **`splunk.table`** adherence outliers filtered **`sessions_seen>12`** to suppress trainees flagged once.
Weekly cadence: Monday **`wf_capacity_review`** ritual compares **`occupancy_pct`** rolling averages versus shrink-adjusted hiring plans (`README-wfm.md`).
Executive appendix attaches **`splunk.sankey`** exports packaged into PDF alongside CFO staffing variance commentary referencing Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** deltas quarter-over-quarter.
Automation hooks: **`phantom`**/`SOAR` playbook triggers coaching backlog **`learning`** LMS assignments whenever **`adherence_pct`** breaches minus twelve-point swing relative trailing median — narrative cites Cornell **`ILR`** turnover risk framing rather than punitive surveillance tone.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
1) Mid-shift voluntary rest captured inside CCaaS **`Unavailable`** without matching WFM auxiliary codes duplicates adherence misses until **`reason_code`** normalization maps **REST/BREAK** synonyms.
2) Outbound blended queues tally **`busy`** talk-time toward occupancy though Erlang numerator excludes outbound **`lambda`** — bifurcate **`campaign_direction`** dimensions prior comparing **`occupancy_pct`** versus **`traffic_erlangs`**.
3) Concurrent chat sessions multiply productive seconds relative to roster minutes — enforce modality-aware **`busy_like_s`** caps equal to contractual concurrency ceilings.
4) **`after_call_work`** forced wrap timers truncate differently (**Genesys Cloud** sixty-second hard-stop versus **Talkdesk** CRM-trigger release) causing ACW drift across vendors — harmonize **`duration_sec`** ingestion windows.
5) Supervisor mentoring flagged **`Unavailable`** though KPI frameworks treat mentorship as productive — exclude **`reason_code=MentorCoach`** from adherence penalties via governance-approved **`eval`** masks.
6) PSTN outages leaving agents **`Available`** without inbound **`busy`** ticks distort occupancy downward though Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** collapses simultaneously — correlate **`carrier_health`** feeds.
7) Global campuses crossing **`UTC`** midnight shift bids yield **`hour_bucket`** collisions until **`segment_start_local`** normalized via **`strftime`** with **`%Z`** offsets tied to agent home zones.
8) Weekly roster swaps failing replication between Aspect planner UI and JDBC pulls produce stale **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** — freshness probes via Splunk introspection searches against scheduled lookup inputs guard adherence compares.
9) Voluntary overtime extending beyond roster **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** counts inflates adherence numerators differently per vendor overtime policies — annotate **`actual_overlap`** semantics nightly.
10) Callback reservation states pin **`Available`** without live **`busy`** interactions — subtract **`callback_hold`** tagged intervals before **`occupancy_pct`** averages.
11) Payroll **`unpaid`** lunches (**45** minute WFM) diverge from CCaaS **`30`** minute **`lunch`** dwell splits — reconcile dual calendars before accusing chronic over-adherence.
12) Skill-based routing **`reject`** outcomes oscillate **`busy`** versus **`available`** depending on **`RING_NO_ANSWER`** vendor semantics — codify **`RING`** sequences via **`transaction`** diagnostics.
13) Enterprise tenant isolation duplicates (**Disney**, **Apple**, Microsoft EA estates) replicate **`team_uid`** identifiers across child orgs — prepend **`tenant_code`** inside **`eval team_uid`**.
14) **`Genesys Cloud`** distinguishing **`COMMUNICATING`** versus **`INTERACTING`** splits inbound answered versus outbound dialing contexts — remap labels prior benchmarking occupancy versus **`traffic_erlangs`**.


## SPL

```spl
index=business (sourcetype="ccaas:agent_state" OR sourcetype="genesys:agent_aggregate" OR sourcetype="five9:agent_state" OR sourcetype="talkdesk:explore_row") earliest=-24h@h
| eval agent_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(agent_id, agentGuid, agent_no, UserId, "")))
| eval team_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(team_id, skill_group_id, queue_group_key, GroupId, "")))
| eval sess_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(session_id, agentSessionId, SessionKey, interaction_session_key, "")))
| eval raw_state=upper(trim(tostring(coalesce(agent_state, user_state, presence_state, AgentState, ""))))
| eval canon_bucket=case(
    match(raw_state,"^(AVAILABLE|READY|IDLE|ON_QUEUE|AVAILABLE_FOR_CONTACT)$"), "available",
    match(raw_state,"^(BUSY|WORKING|INTERACTING|COMMUNICATING|ON_CALL|ROUTING)$"), "busy",
    match(raw_state,"^(AFTER[_ ]CALL[_ ]WORK|ACW|WRAP[_ ]UP)$"), "after_call_work",
    match(raw_state,"^(BREAK|REST)$"), "break",
    match(raw_state,"^(LUNCH|MEAL)$"), "lunch",
    match(raw_state,"^(TRAINING|COACHING|TUTORIAL)$"), "training",
    match(raw_state,"^(MEETING|SYNC)$"), "meeting",
    match(raw_state,"^(SYSTEM|TECH|LOGGED[_ ]OUT|UNAVAILABLE|OFFLINE)$"), "system_unavailable",
    true(), "system_unavailable")
| eval dur_s=tonumber(coalesce(duration_sec, time_in_state_seconds, dwell_seconds, interval_seconds, "0"))
| bin span=1h _time
| stats sum(eval(if(match(canon_bucket,"^(busy|after_call_work)$"),dur_s,0))) as busy_like_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="available",dur_s,0))) as avail_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="after_call_work",dur_s,0))) as acw_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="busy",dur_s,0))) as busy_only_s,
        dc(sess_uid) as sessions_seen by agent_uid team_uid _time
| eval hour_bucket=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H")
| eval day_key=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d")
| lookup wfm_schedule_segments.csv agent_uid day_key OUTPUT scheduled_customer_seconds matched_inside_schedule
| eval adherence_pct=if(isnotnull(scheduled_customer_seconds) AND scheduled_customer_seconds>0, round(100*coalesce(matched_inside_schedule,0)/scheduled_customer_seconds, 3), null())
| eval denom_metrics=(busy_only_s + acw_s + avail_s)
| eval occupancy_pct=if(denom_metrics>0, round(100*((busy_only_s + acw_s)/denom_metrics), 3), null())
| eval login_denominator=(busy_like_s + avail_s)
| eval occupancy_login_pct=if(login_denominator>0, round(100*(busy_like_s/login_denominator), 3), null())
| join type=left max=0 team_uid hour_bucket [
    search index=business sourcetype="business:queue_skill_hourly" earliest=-24h@h
    | eval team_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(skill_cluster_id, routing_team_id, "")))
    | bin span=1h _time
    | stats sum(offered_calls) as offered_calls avg(staffed_agents) as staffed_agents avg(avg_handle_sec) as avg_handle_sec avg(ans_within_thresh_pct) as vendor_sl_pct avg(abandon_pct) as abandon_pct by team_uid _time
    | eval hour_bucket=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H")
    | eval lambda_per_hour=offered_calls
    | eval traffic_erlangs=lambda_per_hour * avg_handle_sec / 3600
    | eval occupancy_erlang_pct=if(staffed_agents>0, round(100 * traffic_erlangs / staffed_agents, 3), null())
    | eval erlang_sl_thresh_sec=20
    | lookup erlang_c_sl.csv staffed_heads AS staffed_agents traffic_erlangs AS traffic_erlangs thresh_sec AS erlang_sl_thresh_sec OUTPUT sl_within_thresh_pct AS erlang_sl_pct
    | eval erlang_sl_pct=coalesce(erlang_sl_pct, vendor_sl_pct)
  ]
| fields agent_uid team_uid hour_bucket day_key occupancy_pct adherence_pct occupancy_erlang_pct occupancy_login_pct vendor_sl_pct abandon_pct traffic_erlangs lambda_per_hour erlang_sl_pct sessions_seen busy_like_s avail_s acw_s
| sort - occupancy_pct
```

## Visualization

(1) **`splunk.heatmap`** — hour-of-day × **`team_uid`** with cell color **`occupancy_pct`** (green **70–85%**, amber **85–90%**, red **>90%**). (2) **`splunk.line`** — rolling **`occupancy_pct`** plus overlaid translucent target band (**70–85%**) and **`occupancy_erlang_pct`** from queue math. (3) **`splunk.gauge`** — current **`occupancy_pct`** vs **`occupancy_erlang_pct`** paired for under/over-staff reconciliation. (4) **`splunk.table`** — bottom decile **`adherence_pct`** by **`agent_uid`** with **`sessions_seen`** to catch single-session anomalies. (5) **`splunk.sankey`** — inferred **`Available → Busy → After_Call_Work → Break`** transitions built from sequential state pairs (`transaction` command on **`sess_uid`** sorted streams).
